chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The sneezing and the Naming (of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/557)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/557)
text: عَطَسَ رَجُلٌ نَصْرَانِيٌّ عِنْدَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ لَهُ الْقَوْمُ هَدَاكَ اللَّهُ فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَقُولُوا يَرْحَمُكَ اللَّهُ فَقَالُوا لَهُ إِنَّهُ نَصْرَانِيٌّ فَقَالَ لَا يَهْدِيهِ اللَّهُ حَتَّى يَرْحَمَهُ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from one of his companions, from Ibn Abu Najran, from one of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A Christian man sneezed in the presence of Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>. So the people said to him, ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Guide you’. So Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘You should be saying, ‘May Allah<sup>azwj</sup> have Mercy on you’’. So they said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘He is a Christian’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> will not Guide him until He<sup>azwj</sup> has Mercy on him’.
en.sarwar: 18. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from certain individuals of his people from ibn abu Najran from certain individuals of our people from abu ‘ Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Once a Christian man sneezed in the presence of abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) and the people said, ‘May Allah guide you.’ Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) said, ‘Say, “May Allah grant you mercy.’” They said, ‘He is a Christian.’ The Imam said, ‘Allah will not guide him until He grants him mercy.’”
